title: helianthus brasilicus
intro: Helianthus brasilicus, also known as Brazilian sunflower, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Brazil. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helianthus brasilicus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Helianthus brasilicus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in Brazil and other parts of South America.
